# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers the two startup-related options in the TrafficPilot configuration UI to be placed on the same row.
- In TrafficPilot, the config file shortcut buttons should stay on the left, and the fixed `Load Config`/`Save As`/`Save Config` buttons should stay on the right.
- In TrafficPilot, the default proxy scheme should be socks5.
